case_title: JUSTIN SOLOMON et al VS. ERNESTO TORRES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,411.10 FILED BY SOLOMON, JUSTIN SOLOMAN, PHATCHAREE AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ERNESTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF PHATCHAREE SOLOMON WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLOMON, JUSTIN SOLOMAN, PHATCHAREE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, ERNESTO $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $865.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2014 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLOMON, JUSTIN SOLOMAN, PHATCHAREE AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ERNESTO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ERNESTO
